data.title: BNB Drops Below 780 USDT with a Narrowed 1.98% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 26, 2025, 15:13 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 780 USDT and is now trading at 779.960022 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.98% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Crypto Analyst Warns XRP Investors Amid Market Retrace
data.description:
Crypto analyst Steph has issued a warning to XRP investors regarding the current price action. He alluded to a multi-year resistance that the altcoin has struggled to break, noting that this should be the major focus as it eyes new highs. XRP Needs to Break Above the $3. 6 Resistance In an X post, Steph shared a video in which he analysed the XRP monthly chart, dating back to the 2020 bull run
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/analyst-warns-xrp-investors/

data.title: Wall Street analysts believe Trump’s trade deals are going to be ruled illegal by the SCOTUS
data.description:
Wall Street analysts are betting hard against Trump’s trade agenda surviving in court. The lawsuits stacking up across the country are gunning straight for the legal base of his tariff powers. And they’re not just hoping to overturn a few decisions; they’re trying to wipe out nearly all of Trump’s recent trade deals by arguing […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/wall-street-trump-trade-deals-illegal-scotus/

data.title: Trump ramps up America’s market intervention to crisis-level scale
data.description:
Donald Trump is pushing the U. S. government deeper into corporate boardrooms, taking direct ownership stakes and executive power in private companies on a scale not seen outside of wartime or national economic emergencies. What used to be dismissed as government overreach is now official White House policy. According to reporting from CNBC, this hands-on approach […]

data.title: Robinhood Adds Hedera (HBAR) Spot Trading
data.description:
Robinhood, the popular investing platform, has recently announced the addition of Hedera (HBAR) to its offerings, allowing users to engage in spot trading for this cryptocurrency. This move marks an important expansion of Robinhood's cryptocurrency trading options, enabling its users to buy and sell HBAR directly on the platform in real-time, thereby enhancing their investment opportunities in the rapidly evolving digital asset market.
source: https://blocknews.com/robinhood-adds-hedera-hbar-spot-trading/

data.title: Bank Insider Drains $195,000 From Churches, Kids Museum and Customers, Fakes Own Death To Prevent Recovery of Incriminating Evidence: US Department of Justice
data.description:
A bank employee is pleading guilty to stealing from the lender’s customers and lying to conceal her guilt, according to the US Attorney’s Office for the Eastern District of Virginia. The Eastern District says Truist Bank employee, Ahshah Dior Martin, stole $195,000 from at least 70 Truist Bank accounts.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/26/bank-insider-drains-195000-from-churches-kids-museum-and-customers-fakes-own-death-to-prevent-recovery-of-incriminating-evidence-us-department-of-justice/

data.title: Chainlink Price Dips but Institutional Momentum Builds
data.description:

source: https://blocknews.com/chainlink-price-dips-but-institutional-momentum-builds/

data.title: SEC Eyes VanEck Avalanche ETF as AVAX Gears for Next Move
data.description:
The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is closely monitoring the progress of the VanEck Avalanche Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF), as the cryptocurrency Avalanche (AVAX) prepares to make its next significant market move. This heightened scrutiny by the regulatory body reflects the growing interest in the integration of cryptocurrency assets into conventional financial instruments, while AVAX is positioned to potentially experience a shift in its trading momentum or strategic developments in the upcoming period.
source: https://blocknews.com/sec-eyes-vaneck-avalanche-etf-as-avax-gears-for-next-move/
